video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 4 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: 140 kilometers of a stage from catania to villa france 140 kilometers one big mountain in the middle three men got up the road marco farporti was there alongside simon poulo and camille graddick two of the invited italian teams and the world to a ccc team they're allowed around four to five minutes maximum gap uae emirates and cal bama were the first to ride but 86 kilometers to go there was a bit of a problem for peter vanning trying to take a beat on taking down eduardo sepulveda at the same time baining stopped for a moment and had a chat to the doctor but he was back on his bike up to the first intermediate sprint points on offer for the mariachi clamino and it was well defended at this point by diego ulissi only losing a point to sagan with 70 kilometers to go and around six to seven k's before the top of the climb some other sprinters were dropped including fernando gaberia eliaviani at the back as well same could be said of alberto hodge on the descents from the mountain we saw simon pulu maximum points in the king of the mountains just before that nine points to him and with the wet descent out the way some riders would get back on leo viviani one such rider next intermediate sprint and this was for the bonus seconds great job from the koenig quick step a brilliant try from kaiser and doing so well what they did at the tour de france again al nader increasing his lead and points taken up behind two breakaway already caught there with 23 k's to go and in the final kilometer this is how it was set up a crazy messy sprint at the gyro d'italia launched first by peter sagan in the black and green there left hand side right as we look at it now al nordimal you
